pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.17.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā itthī pavutthapatikā jārena gabbhinī hoti.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.17.1.eng: At one time a woman whose husband was living away from home became pregnant by a lover.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.17.2.eng: She said to a monk who associated with her family,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.17.3.eng: “Venerable, please help me have an abortion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.17.5.eng: and he helped her have an abortion.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.17.8.eng: “You have committed an offense entailing expulsion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa purisassa dve pajāpatiyo honti—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.1.eng: At one time a certain man had two wives,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.3.eng: The barren one said to a monk who associated with her family,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.4.pli: “sace sā, bhante, vijāyissati sabbassa kuṭumbassa issarā bhavissati.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.4.eng: “If the other wife gives birth to a son, venerable, she’ll become the head wife.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.5.eng: Please make her have an abortion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.9.eng: but the mother did not die.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.11.eng: “You have committed an offense entailing expulsion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.12.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa purisassa dve pajāpatiyo honti—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.12.eng: At one time a certain man had two wives,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.14.eng: The barren one said to a monk who associated with her family,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.15.pli: “sace sā, bhante, vijāyissati sabbassa kuṭumbassa issarā bhavissati.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.15.eng: “If the other wife gives birth to a son, venerable, she’ll become the head wife.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.16.eng: Please make her have an abortion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.20.eng: but the child did not die.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.22.comm: It is not an offense entailing expulsion because he was aiming to kill the child, not the mother.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.24.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa purisassa dve pajāpatiyo honti—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.24.eng: At one time a certain man had two wives,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.26.eng: The barren one said to a monk who associated with her family,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.27.pli: “sace sā, bhante, vijāyissati sabbassa kuṭumbassa issarā bhavissati.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.27.eng: “If the other wife gives birth to a son, venerable, she’ll become the head wife.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.18.28.eng: Please make her have an abortion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā gabbhinī itthī kulūpakaṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.1.eng: On one occasion a woman who was pregnant said to a monk who associated with her family,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.2.eng: “Venerable, please help me have an abortion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.4.eng: She crushed it and had an abortion.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.6.eng: “You have committed an offense entailing expulsion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.7.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā gabbhinī itthī kulūpakaṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.7.eng: On one occasion a woman who was pregnant said to a monk who associated with her family,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.8.eng: “Venerable, please help me have an abortion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.10.eng: She heated herself and had an abortion.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.19.12.eng: “You have committed an offense entailing expulsion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.20.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā vañjhā itthī kulūpakaṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.20.1.eng: On one occasion a barren woman said to a monk who associated with her family,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.20.2.eng: “Please find some medicine, venerable, to help me become pregnant.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.20.4.eng: and he gave her some medicine.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.20.8.eng: but there’s an offense of wrong conduct.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.21.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā vijāyinī itthī kulūpakaṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.21.1.eng: On one occasion a fertile woman said to a monk who associated with her family,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.21.2.eng: “Please find some medicine, venerable, to help me not become pregnant.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.21.3.eng: “Alright,” he said, and he gave her some medicine.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.21.7.eng: but there’s an offense of wrong conduct.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.22.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū sattarasavaggiyaṁ bhikkhuṁ aṅgulipatodakena hāsesuṁ.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.22.1.eng: On one occasion the monks from the group of six tickled a monk from the group of seventeen to make him laugh.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.22.2.eng: Being unable to catch his breath, he died.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.23.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena sattarasavaggiyā bhikkhū chabbaggiyaṁ bhikkhuṁ kammaṁ karissāmāti ottharitvā māresuṁ.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.23.1.eng: On one occasion the monks from the group of seventeen overpowered a monk from the group of six, intending to do a legal procedure against him. He died.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.23.1.comm: The text doesn’t say what the legal procedure, the (saṅgha-)kamma, was about, but it seems implied that it was against that monk. This is also the position of the sub-commentary at Sp-ṭ 1.187: Kammādhippāyāti tajjanīyādikammakaraṇādhippāyā, “Aiming at a legal procedure: aiming at doing a legal procedure of censure, etc.” The monks from the group of seventeen were in regular conflict with the monks from the group of six.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.24.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhūtavejjako bhikkhu yakkhaṁ jīvitā voropesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.24.1.eng: On one occasion an exorcist monk killed a spirit.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.25.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ vāḷayakkhavihāraṁ pāhesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.25.1.eng: On one occasion a monk sent a second monk to a dwelling inhabited by predatory spirits.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.25.4.eng: “There’s no offense for one who isn’t aiming at death.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.25.5.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu maraṇādhippāyo aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ vāḷayakkhavihāraṁ pāhesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.25.5.eng: On one occasion a monk sent a second monk to a dwelling inhabited by predatory spirits, aiming to kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.25.7.eng: The spirits did not kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ vāḷakantāraṁ pāhesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.1.eng: On one occasion a monk sent a second monk to a wilderness inhabited by predatory animals.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.4.eng: “There’s no offense for one who isn’t aiming at death.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.5.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu maraṇādhippāyo aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ vāḷakantāraṁ pāhesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.5.eng: On one occasion a monk sent a second monk to a wilderness inhabited by predatory animals, aiming to kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.7.eng: The predatory animals did not kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.11.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ corakantāraṁ pāhesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.11.eng: On one occasion a monk sent a second monk to a wilderness inhabited by criminals.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.14.eng: “There’s no offense for one who isn’t aiming at death.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.15.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu maraṇādhippāyo aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ corakantāraṁ pāhesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.15.eng: On one occasion a monk sent a second monk to a wilderness inhabited by criminals, aiming to kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.26.17.eng: The criminals did not kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.27.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu taṁ maññamāno taṁ jīvitā voropesi …pe…
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.27.1.eng: On one occasion a monk killed a person, thinking it was them …

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.27.2.eng: killed another person, thinking it was them …

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.27.3.eng: killed a person, thinking they were another …

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.27.4.eng: killed another person, thinking they were another.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.27.6.eng: “You have committed an offense entailing expulsion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu amanussena gahito hoti.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.1.eng: At one time a monk was possessed by a spirit.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.2.pli: Aññataro bhikkhu tassa bhikkhuno pahāraṁ adāsi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.2.eng: Another monk gave him a blow.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.5.eng: “There’s no offense for one who isn’t aiming at death.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.6.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu amanussena gahito hoti.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.6.eng: At one time a monk was possessed by a spirit.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.7.pli: Aññataro bhikkhu maraṇādhippāyo tassa bhikkhuno pahāraṁ adāsi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.28.7.eng: A second monk gave him a blow, aiming to kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu kalyāṇakammassa saggakathaṁ kathesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.1.eng: On one occasion a monk gave a talk about heaven to a man of good behavior.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.2.eng: He became keen on it and died.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.4.eng: “There’s no offense for one who isn’t aiming at death.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.5.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu maraṇādhippāyo kalyāṇakammassa saggakathaṁ kathesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.5.eng: On one occasion a monk gave a talk about heaven to a man of good behavior, aiming to kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.6.eng: He became keen on it and died. …

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.7.eng: He became keen on it, but did not die.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.11.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu nerayikassa nirayakathaṁ kathesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.11.eng: On one occasion a monk gave a talk about hell to a man bound for hell.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.14.eng: “There’s no offense for one who isn’t aiming at death.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.15.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu maraṇādhippāyo nerayikassa nirayakathaṁ kathesi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.15.eng: On one occasion a monk gave a talk about hell to a man bound for hell, aiming to kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.29.17.eng: He became terrified, but did not die.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena āḷavakā bhikkhū navakammaṁ karontā rukkhaṁ chindanti.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.1.eng: On one occasion the monks of Āḷavī were felling a tree while doing building work.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.2.eng: A monk said to a second monk,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.4.pli: Taṁ tatraṭṭhitaṁ chindantaṁ rukkho ottharitvā māresi.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.4.eng: He did. The tree fell on him, and he died.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.6.eng: “There’s no offense for one who isn’t aiming at death.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.7.pli: Tena kho pana samayena āḷavakā bhikkhū navakammaṁ karontā rukkhaṁ chindanti.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.7.eng: On one occasion the monks of Āḷavī were felling a tree while doing building work.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.8.pli: Aññataro bhikkhu maraṇādhippāyo aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.8.eng: A monk said to a second monk,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.9.eng: “Fell it while standing here,” aiming to kill him.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.10.pli: Taṁ tatraṭṭhitaṁ chindantaṁ rukkho ottharitvā māresi …pe…
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.10.eng: He did. The tree fell on him, and he died. …

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.30.11.eng: The tree fell on him, but he did not die.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.31.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū dāyaṁ ālimpesuṁ;
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.31.1.eng: On one occasion the monks from the group of six set fire to a forest grove.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.31.4.eng: “There’s no offense for one who isn’t aiming at death.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.31.5.pli: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū maraṇādhippāyā dāyaṁ ālimpesuṁ.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.31.5.eng: On one occasion the monks from the group of six set fire to a forest grove, aiming to cause death.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.31.7.eng: People were burned, but did not die.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu āghātanaṁ gantvā coraghātaṁ etadavoca—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.1.eng: On one occasion a monk went to a place of execution and said to the executioner,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.3.eng: Kill him with a single blow.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.5.eng: and he killed him with a single blow.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.7.eng: “You have committed an offense entailing expulsion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.8.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu āghātanaṁ gantvā coraghātaṁ etadavoca—
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.8.eng: On one occasion a monk went to a place of execution and said to the executioner,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.10.eng: Kill him with a single blow.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.32.15.eng: but there’s an offense of wrong conduct.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.1.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro puriso ñātighare hatthapādacchinno ñātakehi samparikiṇṇo hoti.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.1.eng: On one occasion a man whose hands and feet had been cut off was at his relatives’ house, surrounded by his relations.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.2.eng: A monk said to those people,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.9.eng: “You have committed an offense entailing expulsion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.10.pli: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro puriso kulaghare hatthapādacchinno ñātakehi samparikiṇṇo hoti.
pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.10.eng: On one occasion a man whose hands and feet had been cut off was at home, surrounded by his relations.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.11.eng: A nun said to those people,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.15.eng: They gave him the salty purgative

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.18.pli: Atha kho sā bhikkhunī bhikkhunīnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.19.eng: who in turn told the monks,

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.21.eng: “Monks, that nun has committed an offense entailing expulsion.”

pli-tv-bu-vb-pj3:5.33.22.eng: The third offense entailing expulsion is finished.
